headline: Sable Offshore shares are trading higher after the company announced that it expects first oil sales to begin in April 2026 following a U.S. government order to allow oil flows through a California pipeline.
summary: Sable Offshore shares are trading higher after the company announced that it expects first oil sales to begin in April 2026 following a U.S. government order to allow oil flows through a California pipeline.

headline: Smart Money At Play: DAVID NEITHERCUT Acquires Equity Residential Stock Options Worth $82K
summary:
In a new SEC filing on June 23, it was unveiled that NEITHERCUT, Director at Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR), acquired stock options for 50,997 shares.
What Happened: A Form 4 filing from the U.S. Securities and Exchange
